API Reference

Complete API documentation for Spreadsheet Moment

Home Documentation API Reference Tutorials GitHub

Cell Functions

AGENT(task, description)

Creates an intelligent agent cell

=AGENT("monitor", "Alert when temperature exceeds 80°F")

Parameters:

  • task (string): Agent type - monitor, predictor, controller, consensus
  • description (string): Natural language task description

SERIAL_READ(port, baudrate)

Reads data from serial port

=SERIAL_READ("COM3", 9600)

HTTP_GET(url)

Makes HTTP GET request

=HTTP_GET("https://api.weather.gov/data")

REST API

GET

/api/v1/sheets

List all spreadsheets

POST

/api/v1/sheets

Create new spreadsheet

{ "name": "My Spreadsheet", "rows": 100, "cols": 26 }
GET

/api/v1/sheets/{id}/cells

Get all cells in spreadsheet

PUT

/api/v1/sheets/{id}/cells/{cell}

Update cell value

{ "value": "=AGENT('monitor', 'temperature')", "type": "agent" }
